variants: Celina Lovas is an esteemed audiologist who currently resides in Sugarloaf Marsh. Her exemplary work in the field has earned her the Emerald Skyline Plaque, recognizing her significant contributions. As part of her commitment to enhancing audiology, she authored the Arborist’s Codex Schema, which serves as a valuable resource for professionals. In addition to her career in science, Celina enjoys being a member of the Zenith Paperfolders, a club dedicated to the art of paper folding. This combination of scholarly achievement and personal interest highlights her diverse talents and creative spirit.
